task_completion.description: The agent opens the patrol assignment document to read the instructions.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal displaying the contents of ~/Documents/patrol_assignment.txt.

task_completion.description: The agent configures the Ekos capture module with the required imaging parameters.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos Capture tab is visible, showing an exposure time of 30 seconds, Filter 1 (or Luminance), and a frame count of at least 4.

task_completion.description: The agent captures images of the four assigned Virgo Cluster galaxies.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Ekos sequence queue or capture progress shows targets M87, M84, M100, and M49 being processed or completed.

task_completion.description: The captured images are saved into target-specific directories.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A file manager or terminal window showing directories named after the targets (e.g., M87, M84, M100, M49) inside /home/ga/Images/patrol/virgo, containing .fits files.

task_completion.description: The agent generates a formatted patrol log summarizing the session.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal showing the content of patrol_log.txt located in /home/ga/Images/patrol/virgo, listing the targets and session details.

integrity.description: The agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to capture the images.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the KStars application and Ekos interface being actively used, rather than terminal commands creating dummy .fits files.

integrity.description: The patrol log was generated by the agent based on the session.
integrity.visual_evidence: The agent is seen typing or using a script to create patrol_log.txt after or during the capture process, rather than copying a pre-existing file.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the graphical interface of the astronomy software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse clicks, window focus changes, and GUI interactions in KStars/Ekos are visible across the screenshots.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The assigned targets are M87, M84, M100, and M49. The imaging requirements are at least 4 frames per target, 30-second exposures, and filter slot 1 (Luminance). The images must be saved in target-specific directories under /home/ga/Images/patrol/virgo. The final patrol log must be saved at /home/ga/Images/patrol/virgo/patrol_log.txt.
